top_signals.title: Takaichi to attend NATO summit in Turkey and seek closer ties with alliance
top_signals.summary: Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi aims to confirm with NATO that the security of the Indo-Pacific region and that of Europe are inseparable, seeking greater NATO involvement in Asia
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: The challenge of being neurodivergent in Japan’s culture of conformity
top_signals.summary: As awareness grows, more Japanese adults are finding answers to challenges that went unnoticed for years.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: U.S. House bill would erect crypto-theft task force across law enforcement agencies
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: BTS-mania poised to boost South Korea's economy well into the future
top_signals.summary: BTS-mania, with all the fan spending and travel, is poised to boost South Korea's economy well into the future

top_signals.title: SMBC-backed Yes Bank sees Indians tip-toeing back to deposits
top_signals.summary: Bank credit in India grew 16.2% in the year through May 15, the fastest pace since June 2024, according to central bank data, while deposits rose 12.2% over the same period.
